title: Flower Seeds 2 - Aether
body:
# Flower Seeds 2 - Aether  


Aether support for Flower Seeds 2  
 

Adding:

*   Flower crops
*   Villager Trades for seeds
*   Botany Pots, Thermal Insulator, IE Cloche support
*   Flowers now reference vanilla models so any resourcepack that changes flower models should be compatible with the crops  

 
### Flowers Supported  

* * *
 
* White Flower
* Purple Flower
